title: The Retainer Receipt in Edgar's Satchel
description: If Edgar Williams's document satchel is searched — either by his consent under pressure or by the Night Marshal acting on a sworn complaint — you find, folded inside the lining, a receipt for $200 from a Chicago financial agency account registered to H. Stede, dated six days ago. The receipt bears Edgar Williams's signature and the notation 'retainer re: W.S. bond tranche.' It is not a crime in itself, but it places Edgar in a financial relationship with an outside interest at the precise moment the falsified cost certificate was circulating.
